title: taraxacum subborgvallii
intro: Taraxacum subborgvallii, also known as the Swedish dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial plant with a rosette of leaves and a tall stem bearing yellow flowers, similar to the common dandelion (Taraxacum officinale). The medicinal properties of Taraxacum subborgvallii include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant, making it useful for treating urinary issues, skin conditions, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum subborgvallii can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which have been traditionally used to promote digestive health, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system.
